title: Create: Garnished
description: A Create Mod Addon that adds different food items, mainly nuts.
body:
[![mmc-reviews](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/mmcreviews_64h.png?raw=true)](https://mmcreviews.com/all/mods/create-garnished/) [![curseforge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/curseforge_64h.png?raw=true)]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/garnished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/garnished)) [![github](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/github_64h.png?raw=true)](https://github.com/DakotaPride/create-garnished) [![discord](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-plural_64h.png?raw=true)](https://discord.gg/8NkWwu9hgN) [![kinetic_hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e54853825c80a1ccf03302564e00b3483d7e57.png)](https://www.kinetichosting.net)
Available for Fabric & NeoForge!

If you're looking for the rework version, which completely removes previous content with smaller updates. - [go here instead](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/create-garnished-reworked).

THIS MOD AND THE DEVELOPER BE GAY AND TRANS AF

Scatterred across the Plains biome, you can find trees with unique leaves and logs that can provide you with nuts or a light green (it's lime, Minecraft) wood palette to build with. The leaves found on these trees in particular can provide a random nut out of the 9 different nut types: Almonds, Cashews, Pistachios, Macadamias, Pecans, Walnuts, Hazelnuts, Chestnuts, and Peanuts. Each of these nuts have their own unique uses which will be talked about later, but it's highly recommended to install a recipe viewer. Create: Garnished has built-in integration with JEI (Just Enough Items), but I'd personally recommend installing both JEI and EMI alongside each other. All of this to say that if you're playing the Create mod with addons, you've most likely already installed one of these, if not, both. Found throughout the different nether biomes, the end dimension, and even some other overworld biomes, you can also find some unique vegetation that can be used as, again, either ingredients for your feasts or as decorative building blocks! Eventually, with enough automation, you can create Hadean variants of the 9 nuts that provide different status effects, as shown in their tooltip. While, again, these nuts have other unique uses, I'm sure that you will use this feature more so than others. [Create: Garnished Wiki](https://create-garnished.github.io/index.html) Small Note about the Create: Garnished Wiki linked above: It's not received an update in a good while and will likely be fully discontinued. At some point, I do hope to make a proper wiki that has any information needed for the pre-rework version of Create: Garnished. Contributors/Credits Create: Garnished in DejojoTheAwsome's "15 Create 6.0 Addons You Need To Play!" [DejojoTheAwsome](https://www.youtube.com/@dejojotheawsome) - Overview [v0.5, v0.8] [Create Dev Team](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - Original Mod Developers & Artists [Create Fabric Dev Team](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - Fabric Mod Developers & Artists ## Available Versions Minecraft 1.21/1.21.1 - Fabric/Neoforge - Supported (Fabric will be ported when Create Fabric updates) Minecraft 1.20/1.20.1 - Fabric/Forge - up to v2.1.2 (Fabric will be ported when Create Fabric updates) Minecraft 1.19/1.19.1/1.19.2 - Fabric/Forge - up to v2.0.2 Minecraft 1.18/1.18.1/1.18.2 - Fabric/Forge - up to v1.7.4 ## Dependencies in 1.21+ Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) on Fabric (Currently not supported on Fabric just yet) Requires [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) on Fabric (Currently not supported on Fabric just yet) Requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) on Neoforge (Currently not supported on Fabric just yet) #### **CONTEXT BEHIND STATEMENT AT TOP OF PAGE** **Holy guacamole people didn't like this, so here's context behind it: (if you are against LGBTQ identities, you're in the wrong place)**
